title: Surgeon Vacancy at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates:
Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals Asia Pacific Associates!
